hooks.command:
printf '
=== COURSE CONTEXT (auto-injected on session start) ===
You are resuming the "Containers for GenAI & Agentic AI" course build. Trust the on-disk docs over memory. Read CLAUDE.md, then planning/STATE.md and planning/ROADMAP.md. If lab work is next, re-verify Rancher Desktop + Ollama. Current STATE.md:

'; cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/planning/STATE.md" 2>/dev/null || cat planning/STATE.md 2>/dev/null
